name: Nicol Gunsalu
professional_summary: CompTIA A+ certified professional with 3+ years across CRM administration, high-volume client operations, and team management. Maintained 98–99% CRM accuracy across multiple employers. Led a remote team of 6. Handled 70–100+ daily client interactions. Fully remote setup, available immediately.
skills: CRM data entry and record maintenance (98–99% accuracy)
Hardware troubleshooting and maintenance — PCs, laptops
Excel — pivot tables, structured data management

highlights: Handled 100+ UK client calls daily while resolving contract-related queries
Managed client complaints and FAQs, reducing escalation rates by 15%
Updated CRM records with 98% accuracy, ensuring client data integrity
Led a remote team of 6 appointment setters, improving appointment booking rates
Optimized CRM workflows (GoHighLevel) to track staff performance and ensure quality
Provided script coaching to staff, enhancing call effectiveness and conversion
Processed 70+ daily insurance inquiries; consistently ranked in top 3 agents for sales
Maintained CRM records with 99% accuracy to improve client communication
Explained insurance contract terms clearly, boosting client satisfaction and policy uptake
Engaged with clients to explain digital information products, handling 80+ calls daily
Upsold additional services, contributing to a 10% increase in revenue
Updated client files with accurate details, reducing follow-up errors
Assisted with maintenance and software updates of gym equipment, ensuring minimal downtime
Provided facility tours and enforced safety measures for members
Supported front-desk staff with member queries, ensuring smooth operations
Developed a simple asset management system to track and assess computer and network devices
Collected and analyzed device performance data to identify faults and suggest maintenance actions
Managed structured asset data in Excel and Google Sheets for accurate reporting
Prepared maintenance and optimization reports using Google Docs and Microsoft Word

note: Fully remote setup in Cape Town. Available immediately. CompTIA A+ certified. 3+ years CRM experience across 4 employers. Managed teams remotely.
